summary: Dashboard AI and music polish, natural greeting, and collapsible quick-action panels.

introduced: Collapsible Nucleus AI and Apple Music panels with dashboard settings toggles
changed: Dashboard greeting weaves the day and date into a natural sentence with the quote underneath
Apple Music search shows album artwork, scrolls through all results, and matches Nucleus AI panel height
fixed: Nucleus AI retries over IPv4 when local DNS only resolves unreachable IPv6 for nucleus-ai.suherman.net
